hero.positioning: Rigorous clinical care, radical transparency — because trust comes before treatment.

intro.heading: Every Child. Every Family. Every Generation.
intro.body1: At Zurriya, we see the child in front of us — and the generation they will become.
intro.body2: Our work combines clinical precision with genuine family partnership, because progress that outlasts the session is the only progress that matters.
intro.body3: When one child grows, a family grows with them.

services.heading: How We Help
services.card1Desc: Detailed, evidence-based evaluations to understand each child's unique developmental profile.
services.card2Desc: Personalized programs built around each child's strengths, needs, and goals.
services.card3Desc: Active collaboration so families can confidently support their child's growth every day.

vision.heading: Built for More Than a Session
vision.body: We believe that supporting one child strengthens a family — and strengthening families helps build healthier communities and future generations.

closing.heading: Ready to take the first step?
closing.body: Every child's journey is unique. Let's understand yours.

mission.heading: Who We Are
mission.p1: Zurriya is a child and adolescent development center built on a single conviction: that families deserve both clinical excellence and complete transparency. We call this trust before treatment.
mission.p2: Our work is grounded in evidence, shaped by compassion, and designed around the whole child — not just a presenting symptom. Every assessment, every intervention, every recommendation is built to be understood by the families we serve, not just filed in a report.
mission.p3: We specialize in understanding how children think, learn, communicate, behave, and interact with the world around them — and in building individualized plans that translate clinical insight into real, lasting change across home, school, and every environment a child inhabits.

approach.heading: Our Approach
approach.p1: We work at the intersection of science and relationship. Every assessment and intervention draws on current evidence and individual clinical reasoning — but equally on genuine partnership with each family. Parents are not passive recipients of reports; they are active participants in the work.
approach.p2: Because meaningful progress only happens when the environment around the child is aligned — home, school, and clinic all pointing in the same direction.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.p1: We believe that supporting one child strengthens a family — and strengthening families helps build healthier communities and future generations. The name Zurriya (ذرية) is drawn from this belief: a Quranic word meaning offspring, progeny, the generations that grow from a root.
vision.p2: Our purpose is to be that root — to create a professional, compassionate, and transparent space where children grow with confidence, families feel genuinely understood, and every developmental milestone becomes a step toward a brighter generation.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.body: We speak honestly — about what we observe, what we offer, and what we cannot.

compassion.title: Compassion
compassion.body: Every family arrives with real fears. We receive them with warmth and hold them with respect.

excellence.title: Scientific Excellence
excellence.body: Our methods are current, evidence-based, and held to real outcomes — not just clinical convention.

family.title: Family Partnership
family.body: Progress that outlasts the session only happens when families understand and participate in the work.

growth.title: Continuous Growth
growth.body: We invest in our own learning as seriously as we invest in the children we serve.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.body: We take careful account of the trust families place in us — and the weight of every recommendation we make.

hero.heading: Our Services
hero.subheading: Comprehensive support for every stage of your child's developmental journey.

assessments.heading: Comprehensive Assessments
assessments.intro: We provide detailed, evidence-based assessments to better understand each child's unique developmental profile, including:
assessments.closing: These assessments help families gain a clear understanding of their child's strengths, challenges, and individualized recommendations.

intervention.heading: Individualized Intervention
intervention.intro: Based on each child's assessment results and goals, we develop personalized intervention programs that may include:
intervention.closing: Every intervention is tailored to the child's developmental level, learning style, and family priorities.

partnership.heading: Parent Partnership
partnership.intro: We believe that meaningful progress happens when professionals and families work together. Parents are active partners throughout the entire process.
partnership.closing: Our goal is to help families confidently support their child's development beyond the therapy room.

cta.heading: Ready to learn more?
cta.body: Contact us to discuss which services are right for your child.

hero.heading: Get in Touch
hero.subheading: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to discuss how we can support your child and family.

form.name: Full Name
